'''''Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War''''' is a story arc of the [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi (comic series)|''Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi'']] [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] series. It ran from [[August 1]], [[1995]] to [[January 1]], [[1996]] and was published by [[Dark Horse Comics]].

==Plot summary==
''[[Ulic Qel-Droma/Legends|Ulic Qel-Droma]] has spent a lifetime learning to control [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. He wanted to be on the side of the good, a member of the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] elite. But it is not the Force one must control to become a Jedi; rather, one must learn to control oneself. Ulic Qel-Droma has tasted power, and now he cannot fight the dark hunger inside him...''

==Continuity==
While [[Dark Horse Comics]]' timeline included in comics they published by the time of ''[[Star Wars: Crimson Empire]]'', [[The Essential Chronology (real-world book)|''The Essential Chronology'']], ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'', and the [[Dark Horse Comics]] [[Star Wars Omnibus: Tales of the Jedi Volume 2|omnibus for ''Dark Lords of the Sith'' and ''The Sith War'']] date ''[[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith|Dark Lords of the Sith]]'' to [[3997 BBY]] and ''The Sith War'' to [[3996 BBY]],<ref name="CE">''[[Star Wars: Crimson Empire]]''</ref><ref name="EC">[[The Essential Chronology (real-world book)|''The Essential Chronology'']]</ref><ref name="New Essential Chronology">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref><ref name="Omnibus">''[[Star Wars Omnibus: Tales of the Jedi Volume 2]]''</ref> the timeline included in comics published by Dark Horse such as [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith|''Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi — The Golden Age of the Sith'']] dated ''Dark Lords of the Sith'' to 3992 BBY and ''The Sith War'' to 3990 BBY, approximately two years after ''Dark Lords of the Sith'',<ref name="Golden Age">''[[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith]]''</ref> the article [[The Horse's Mouth|Straight from the Horse's Mouth: A Guide to the ''Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi'' Universe, Part 1]], which was published in [[Star Wars Insider 26]], says that the events of ''The Sith War'' happened in 3991 BBY,<ref name="SWI26">{{InsiderCite|26|The Horse's Mouth|Straight from the Horse's Mouth: A Guide to the ''Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi'' Universe, Part 1}}</ref> and ''[[Star Wars: The Comics Companion]]'' dated ''Dark Lords of the Sith'' to 3992 BBY and ''The Sith War'' to 3991.5 BBY, approximately six months after ''Dark Lords of the Sith''.<ref name="SWTCC">''[[Star Wars: The Comics Companion]]''</ref>
